metadata.reference: L. Yu. Beliaev, E. Shkondin, A. V. Lavrinenko, O. Takayama. Optical, structural and composition properties of silicon nitride films deposited by reactive radio-frequency sputtering, low pressure and plasma-enhanced chemical vapor deposition. Thin Solid Films 763, 139568 (2022) (Numerical data kindly provided by Osamu Takayama)
metadata.comments: 100 nm thick film deposited by plasma-enchased CVD with certain recipe as an example. Optical properties of SiN films produced by different deposition methods and process parameters can be found in the reference.
